title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Adidas India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Adidas India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Adidas India! We are hiring a Digital Marketing Manager for our Navi Mumbai team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Adidas India:
Adidas India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Adidas India!
